wrapped.query: Summarize those latest Ollama release notes again, briefly.
wrapped.response:
The latest Ollama release notes are not readily available in my training data, but I can suggest some sources where you may find them:

1. GitHub - Releases · ollama/ollama (https://github.com/ollama/ollama/releases)
2. Release Notes - Ollama PDF RAG by Tony Kipkemboi (https://tonykipkemboi.github.io/ollama_pdf_rag/development/changelog/)
